core.name: OpenKai
core.description: Open-source autonomous security agent powered by OpenClaw

commander.name: OpenKai Commander
commander.description: Orchestrator agent — routes and coordinates security tasks across specialist agents

vuln_analyst.name: Vulnerability Analyst
vuln_analyst.description: Triages, prioritizes, and remediates vulnerabilities at machine speed

detection_engineer.name: Detection Engineer
detection_engineer.description: Generates, tunes, and validates detection rules for your SIEM

asset_manager.name: Asset Manager
asset_manager.description: Discovers, enriches, and maps ownership of all cyber assets

threat_intel.name: Threat Intel Analyst
threat_intel.description: Distills threat intelligence and maps TTPs to your environment

compliance_auditor.name: Compliance Auditor
compliance_auditor.description: Automates compliance evidence collection and gap analysis

appsec_analyst.name: AppSec Analyst
appsec_analyst.description: Analyzes SAST and SCA findings to identify true-positive vulnerabilities

identity_guardian.name: Identity Guardian
identity_guardian.description: Audits IAM configurations and enforces least-privilege policies

log_optimizer.name: Log Optimizer
log_optimizer.description: Optimizes log pipelines to reduce SIEM costs while preserving coverage

vuln_triage.name: Triage Vulnerabilities
vuln_triage.description: Analyze and prioritize vulnerabilities based on exploitability, asset context, and business impact

vuln_search.name: Search Vulnerabilities
vuln_search.description: Search vulnerability databases (NVD, EPSS, KEV) for specific CVEs or patterns

vuln_remediate.name: Generate Remediation
vuln_remediate.description: Generate step-by-step remediation guidance for identified vulnerabilities

detection_generate_rule.name: Generate Detection Rule
detection_generate_rule.description: Create SIEM detection rules (Sigma, SPL, KQL) for specified threat patterns

detection_tune_rule.name: Tune Detection Rule
detection_tune_rule.description: Optimize existing detection rules to reduce false positives

detection_validate_rule.name: Validate Detection Rule
detection_validate_rule.description: Test detection rules against sample data for correctness and coverage

asset_discover.name: Discover Assets
asset_discover.description: Scan and discover IT/OT assets across the environment

asset_enrich.name: Enrich Asset
asset_enrich.description: Enrich asset records with ownership, criticality, and context data

asset_map_ownership.name: Map Asset Ownership
asset_map_ownership.description: Determine and assign ownership for discovered assets

threat_intel_analyze.name: Analyze Threat Intel
threat_intel_analyze.description: Process and analyze threat intelligence reports, IOCs, and TTPs

threat_intel_map_ttps.name: Map TTPs
threat_intel_map_ttps.description: Map threat actor TTPs to MITRE ATT&CK framework and your environment

threat_model_generate.name: Generate Threat Model
threat_model_generate.description: Create threat models using STRIDE, MITRE ATT&CK, or custom frameworks

compliance_assess.name: Assess Compliance
compliance_assess.description: Evaluate compliance posture against frameworks (NIST, ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc.)

compliance_collect_evidence.name: Collect Evidence
compliance_collect_evidence.description: Automatically gather compliance evidence from connected systems

compliance_gap_analysis.name: Gap Analysis
compliance_gap_analysis.description: Identify compliance gaps and generate remediation recommendations

log_analyze_pipeline.name: Analyze Log Pipeline
log_analyze_pipeline.description: Analyze log sources to identify volume, value, and optimization opportunities

log_optimize_routing.name: Optimize Log Routing
log_optimize_routing.description: Generate routing rules to direct low-value logs to cold storage

identity_audit_permissions.name: Audit Permissions
identity_audit_permissions.description: Audit IAM policies and identify excessive or unused privileges

identity_generate_policy.name: Generate Least-Privilege Policy
identity_generate_policy.description: Generate least-privilege IAM policies based on actual usage patterns

appsec_analyze_sast.name: Analyze SAST Findings
appsec_analyze_sast.description: Triage static analysis findings to identify true-positive code vulnerabilities

appsec_analyze_sca.name: Analyze SCA Findings
appsec_analyze_sca.description: Analyze software composition findings for exploitable dependency vulnerabilities

appsec_generate_fix.name: Generate Code Fix
appsec_generate_fix.description: Generate developer-ready code fixes for identified application vulnerabilities

splunk.name: Splunk
splunk.description: Connect to Splunk for log search, alert management, and detection rule deployment

elastic.name: Elasticsearch
elastic.description: Connect to Elasticsearch/Kibana for log search and security analytics

sentinel.name: Microsoft Sentinel
sentinel.description: Connect to Microsoft Sentinel for cloud-native SIEM operations

crowdstrike.name: CrowdStrike
crowdstrike.description: Connect to CrowdStrike Falcon for endpoint detection and response

qualys.name: Qualys
qualys.description: Connect to Qualys for vulnerability scanning and assessment data

tenable.name: Tenable
tenable.description: Connect to Tenable.io/Nessus for vulnerability scan results

snyk.name: Snyk
snyk.description: Connect to Snyk for SCA and container vulnerability data

github_security.name: GitHub Advanced Security
github_security.description: Connect to GitHub for code scanning, secret scanning, and Dependabot alerts

jira.name: Jira
jira.description: Connect to Jira for security issue tracking and remediation workflows

servicenow.name: ServiceNow
servicenow.description: Connect to ServiceNow for ITSM integration and change management

vuln_triage.name: Vulnerability Triage
vuln_triage.description: Systematic vulnerability triage workflow with exploitability analysis

sast_analysis.name: SAST Analysis
sast_analysis.description: Static application security testing finding analysis and triage

sca_analysis.name: SCA Analysis
sca_analysis.description: Software composition analysis finding analysis and triage

threat_modeling.name: Threat Modeling
threat_modeling.description: Automated threat modeling with STRIDE and MITRE ATT&CK mapping

detection_rules.name: Detection Rules
detection_rules.description: Detection rule generation, tuning, and validation

compliance_audit.name: Compliance Audit
compliance_audit.description: Compliance posture assessment and evidence collection

asset_discovery.name: Asset Discovery
asset_discovery.description: IT/OT asset discovery, enrichment, and ownership mapping

log_analysis.name: Log Analysis
log_analysis.description: Log pipeline analysis and cost optimization

identity_audit.name: Identity Audit
identity_audit.description: IAM policy audit and least-privilege enforcement

messages.welcome: Welcome to OpenKai. I'm your autonomous security agent. How can I help secure your environment?
messages.no_connector: No connector configured for {{service}}. Please configure it in your .env file.
messages.processing: Analyzing... This may take a moment for large datasets.
messages.confirm_action: I'm about to {{action}}. Shall I proceed?
messages.error_generic: An error occurred: {{error}}. Please check the logs for details.
